completed_tasks.name: Phase 1 accepted as infrastructure, not product MVP
Remote workstream-1/core-integration reviewed
completed_tasks.progress: Do not merge wholesale. Treat as reference only because it deletes current Phase 1 artifacts/tests/scripts, rewinds planning, leaves scouts/extraction stubbed, and regresses verified Yandex endpoint/auth.

remaining_tasks.name: Keep full embedding build/heartbeat active until cache reaches the 36,321 chunk corpus and index/readiness artifacts are refreshed
Plan Phase 2 only after discussion captures unresolved decisions

blockers.description: Current Phase 1 system is infrastructure only: data relevance eval is 0 passed / 20 gated and demo readiness is blocked/stale.
blockers.workaround: Phase 2 acceptance target is all 20 golden cases with correct terminal outcomes.

blockers.description: Remote workstream branch is not directly mergeable.
blockers.workaround: Port reviewed ideas selectively during Phase 2 planning and execution.

decisions.decision: Phase 2 acceptance target is all 20 golden cases, not a small demo subset.
Valid terminal outcomes are passed, needs_clarification, or not_found. Gated/stale/skipped/no_candidate states are not acceptable final outcomes.
Keep Phase 2 seed context as 02-SEED-CONTEXT.md, not 02-CONTEXT.md, so $gsd-discuss-phase 2 still runs.

human_actions_pending.context: The roadmap and seed context now contain the required state.

context_notes: Phase 1 artifacts are not to be deleted or overwritten by stale remote planning. The full jury MVP must implement the real workflow behind Streamlit and pass all 20 golden cases with source-bound deterministic outputs or correct clarification/not-found outcomes.
